commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=eab4d0578f007e68fe3d16fd5bd6c248bc4bc3a9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs` to enforce broker auth for Azure proof, add direct-cloud escape hatches, fall back to a newer Crabbox binary for Blacksmith Testbox, and cover those paths in wrapper tests.

PR surface: Tests +82, Other +82. Total +164 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-only: the diff and added tests show Azure missing-broker paths now exit 2 and Testbox can skip a stale candidate. I did not run tests because this review is read-only, and no live after-fix proof was posted.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer decision on the Azure fail-closed compatibility change plus contributor real behavior proof; there is no safe automated repair to run on this PR yet.

target.title: fix(crabbox): harden Testbox wrapper preflights
target.body:
## Summary

- Make the Crabbox wrapper fail early for Azure proof when broker auth is missing, matching the existing AWS broker guard and giving the operator the correct `crabbox login --url https://crabbox.openclaw.ai --provider azure` recovery path.
- Let Blacksmith Testbox runs skip a stale selected Crabbox binary when a newer PATH/common-dir binary is available, so a stale sibling checkout does not block Testbox proof unnecessarily.
- Add focused wrapper coverage for Azure broker enforcement, direct-debug overrides, and stale Testbox binary fallback.

## Verification

- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/crabbox-wrapper.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs test/scripts/crabbox-wrapper.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Notes for @vincentkoc

This PR fixes the repo-owned friction I hit while running Crabbox/Testbox smoke proof. A few issues are outside this wrapper change:

- Blacksmith Testbox SSH/rsync connection refusals happened before OpenClaw commands ran, so those look provider-side or transient rather than fixable in this repo.
- Intentional raw direct-cloud debugging still needs local cloud auth and CLIs; this PR only steers normal OpenClaw proof through the configured Crabbox broker and makes missing broker auth clearer.
- If a future Testbox image loses Node/Corepack/pnpm again, that should be handled in the Testbox workflow/hydration image. The current workflow path exposed Node 24 and pnpm correctly during the successful rerun.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
